items.title: Hotel, Restaurant & Catering (HRC) 2024 round-up
items.summary: ETL team at HRC — interviews with Hobart UK and FEA on energy-efficient foodservice equipment.
takeaways: Kitchen loads (cold rooms, cooking, HVAC) usually dominate hospitality energy use.
Pair efficient equipment with staff habits and setpoints for durable savings.
Ask Cheryce for related tools, or Artemis/Vincent for equipment and payback next steps.
